summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Nicobenz Beauty Social Coach premium landing page. All major features working correctly including Hero, Problem, Social Proof, Method, Qualifier, Case Studies, Testimonials with YouTube video modals, MediaSection (Book + Podcast), Journal, FAQ accordion, Booking CTA form, Footer, and mobile responsiveness.

integration_issues.issue: Some YouTube videos show 'Video unavailable' - this is a content/YouTube issue, not a code issue. The video IDs (puNZKqsRnFo, 2vI_sbO5Anw, ZvEcbpjawnU, NKgB3S-soVU) may be private or region-restricted on YouTube.

issues: SEO meta tags defined in index.html are being overwritten by Emergent platform defaults at runtime. The code is correct but platform-level injection replaces custom title, description, OG tags, and JSON-LD structured data.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Verify YouTube video IDs are public and not region-restricted (puNZKqsRnFo, 2vI_sbO5Anw, ZvEcbpjawnU, NKgB3S-soVU)
NOTE: SEO meta tags issue is platform-level (Emergent), not code-level - index.html has correct tags
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - clean React components with proper separation of concerns
Mock data is well-structured in mock.js
CSS uses CSS variables for consistent theming
All interactive elements have proper hover states and transitions
Form validation works with toast notifications
YouTube video modals work correctly with proper autoplay and close functionality
seed_data_creation: N/A - All data is mocked in frontend/src/mock.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only React landing page with no backend APIs. All data comes from mock.js. YouTube video embeds may show unavailable if videos are private. SEO meta tags are correctly defined in index.html but overwritten by Emergent platform.
